english: participate; attend; take part in; counsel

etymology.description: 晶 (stars) + 光 (light; brightness) + 彡 (light rays) -> Three Stars mansion
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 晶(晶) (jīng, 'stars'), 光(光) (guāng, 'light; brightness'), and 彡(彡) (shān, 'light rays'), depicting the Three Stars mansion in the sky. These elements together intuitively convey the idea of being part of a constellation, symbolically aligning with the meanings of 'participate' or 'take part in'.

examples.chinese: 我想参加这个活动(我想參加這個活動)。
examples.english: I want to participate in this event.

examples.chinese: 他每天都参加篮球训练(他每天都參加籃球訓練)。
examples.pinyin: Tā měitiān dōu cānjiā lánqiú xùnliàn.
examples.english: He attends basketball practice every day.

examples.chinese: 你愿意参加这个项目吗(你願意參加這個項目嗎)？
examples.pinyin: Nǐ yuànyì cānjiā zhège xiàngmù ma?
examples.english: Are you willing to take part in this project?
